title: deyeuxia sylvatica var. hirsuta
intro: Deyeuxia sylvatica var. hirsuta, also known as hairy Deyeuxia, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Deyeuxia sylvatica var. hirsuta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
